rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 27, 2016, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT NRT WEST, INC. DBA COLDWELL BANKER RESIDENTIAL DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answers. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to state each cause of action and standing and is not uncertain. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT

DBA COLDWELL BANKER RESIDENTIAL MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Granted in part and Denied in part. Motion is granted as to Marbills' request for attorney's fees. Motion is otherwise denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Cross-Complainants' Third Amended Complaint

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINA VELASCO VS. THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 27, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to all causes of action on the statute of limitations issue. Complaint sufficiently alleges delayed discovery and/or equitable tolling. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress for plaintiff to allege facts re: outrageous conduct. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINA VELASCO VS. THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 27, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. The motion is granted without leave to amend to remove the irrelevant term "self-dealing." Allegations and prayer re: injunctive relief are stricken as improper. Motion is otherwise denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANILO STEWART VS. PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Parkmerced Investors Properties, Llc'S Motion To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 27, 2016, line 3. Defendant Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC'S Motion To Strike Complaint is denied in its entirety. From the face of the complaint, there is nothing false or improper in the way Plaintiff Danilo Stewart has worded his allegations involving the $75 late fee. Mr. Stewart adequately alleges entitlement to punitive damages. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID A. BRADLOW VS. NATALIE MARDEUSZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 27, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF DAVID BRADLOW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off Calendar at the request of the moving party. Letter received Oct-26-16. =(501/REQ)
